General.Name: Huaxi Holdings Co Ltd
General.Description: Huaxi Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, prints, and sells cigarette-related packaging materials in the People's Republic of China. It operates through Cigarette Packaging and Environmental Treatment Business segments. The company offers inner frame, cigarette box frame, and tipping papers, as well as cigarette trademark labels, cigarette paper boxes, and other products. It also involved in the biological technology research and related products trading activities; provision of environmental treatment services, as well as environmental protection construction works; and agricultural science and technology related services. Huaxi Holdings Company Limited was founded in 1992 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
